coverage_gap_note: This promise excludes the vast majority of existing farmers who already have electricity connections or use other irrigation methods.

promise_text_en: If farmers lose their lives during agricultural work due to lightning strikes, venomous snake bites, or wild animal attacks, a compensation of Rs. 10 lakh will be provided to their families on behalf of the government.
promise_text_ta: விவசாயப் பணிகளின் போது இடி, விஷப் பாம்பு கடி அல்லது காட்டு விலங்குகள் தாக்குதலால் விவசாயிகள் உயிரிழந்தால், அவர்களின் குடும்பங்களுக்கு அரசின் சார்பில் ரூ.10 லட்சம் இழப்பீடு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 12
impact_mechanism: Provides a one-time financial safety net to the families of farmers who die from specific, work-related natural hazards.

promise_components.component: Provide Rs. 10 lakh compensation to families of farmers who die from lightning, snake bites, or wild animal attacks during agricultural work.
promise_components.analysis: The cost per incident is Rs. 10 lakh. The annual number of such specific fatalities among farmers is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. While the per-incident cost is Rs. 10 lakh, the annual incidence rate is unknown, making the total budget impact incalculable. Such schemes are typically low-cost overall.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise offers crucial financial relief to a family after a tragedy, which is a symptom of the risks of farming. It does not implement preventative measures to address the root causes of these accidents.
coverage_gap_note: Coverage excludes farmer deaths from other common agricultural causes like machinery accidents, heatstroke, or pesticide exposure.

promise_text_en: A scheme providing subsidized loans to small and marginal farmers and agricultural laborers will be implemented to set up goat sheds, cow sheds, and engage in businesses like rearing milch cows, goats, and poultry to improve their livelihoods.
promise_text_ta: சிறு மற்றும் குறு விவசாயிகள் மற்றும் விவசாயத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு மானியக் கடன்கள் வழங்கும் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்பட்டு, ஆட்டுக் கொட்டகைகள், மாட்டுத் தொழுவங்கள் அமைத்தல் மற்றும் கறவை மாடுகள், ஆடுகள், கோழிகள் வளர்த்தல் போன்ற தொழில்களில் ஈடுபட்டு அவர்களின் வாழ்வாதாரத்தை மேம்படுத்த வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 12
impact_mechanism: Aims to diversify and increase income for poor rural households by providing subsidized capital for allied agricultural activities.

promise_components.component: Implement a subsidized loan scheme for small/marginal farmers and agricultural laborers to engage in rearing milch cows, goats, and poultry.
promise_components.analysis: The target group includes ~42 lakh marginal farmer households, plus an unspecified number of small farmers and agricultural laborers. The loan amounts, subsidy percentage, and expected uptake are not defined. Therefore, the total subsidy cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The fiscal impact cannot be determined without details on the loan size, the subsidy component, and the number of beneficiaries who will take up the scheme.
sustainability_reasoning: This scheme provides capital to build income-generating assets. By enabling diversification away from sole reliance on cropping, it addresses the root cause of income instability in agriculture and can create lasting economic improvement.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes farmers who are not classified as 'small' or 'marginal' but may still face significant income instability.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to set up drying yards and storage warehouses at direct paddy procurement centers in the delta districts, along with adequate warehouse facilities at all taluk levels, to improve infrastructure.
promise_text_ta: டெல்டா மாவட்டங்களில் உள்ள நேரடி நெல் கொள்முதல் மையங்களில் உலர்த்தும் களங்கள் மற்றும் சேமிப்புக் கிடங்குகள் அமைக்கப்படும், மேலும் அனைத்து தாலுகா மட்டங்களிலும் போதுமான கிடங்கு வசதிகளுடன் உள்கட்டமைப்பை மேம்படுத்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Reduces post-harvest losses and improves price realization for farmers by creating essential infrastructure for drying and storing crops.

promise_components.component: Set up drying yards and storage warehouses at direct paddy procurement centers in delta districts.
promise_components.analysis: The number of procurement centers in delta districts and the cost to build a drying yard or warehouse are not available in the reference data. Cost is incalculable.

promise_components.component: Establish adequate warehouse facilities at all taluk levels.
promise_components.analysis: The number of taluks in Tamil Nadu and the cost per warehouse are not available in the reference data. Cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a capital expenditure promise, but the total cost cannot be estimated as the number of units to be built and the construction cost per unit are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a one-time investment in physical infrastructure that addresses the root cause of post-harvest losses. These assets provide a long-term benefit to the farming community by improving the agricultural value chain.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in delta districts and near taluk headquarters, potentially leaving out farmers in other regions.

promise_text_en: To encourage the food processing industry based on vegetables, fruits, and other produce grown by farmers, food processing parks will be established in every district.
promise_text_ta: விவசாயிகள் விளைவிக்கும் காய்கறிகள், பழங்கள் மற்றும் பிற விளைபொருட்களை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்ட உணவு பதப்படுத்தும் தொழிலை ஊக்குவிக்க, ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் உணவு பதப்படுத்தும் பூங்காக்கள் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Aims to create agricultural value-addition opportunities and non-farm employment by establishing processing infrastructure across the state.

promise_components.component: Establish food processing parks in every district.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu and the cost to establish a food processing park are not available in the reference data. The cost is therefore incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost cannot be calculated, but establishing industrial parks is a very high-cost capital project, likely requiring significant central government support or private-public partnership models.
sustainability_reasoning: If successful, these parks create a permanent economic ecosystem that links farms to industry, addressing the root problems of low value-addition and market access. This represents a fundamental shift in the agricultural economy.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits may be concentrated among farmers growing specific produce suitable for processing and those located near the parks.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to acquire the house where the great farmer leader Ayya Narayanasamy Naidu lived in Vaiyampalayam, Coimbatore, and convert it into a memorial home.
promise_text_ta: மாபெரும் விவசாயத் தலைவர் அய்யா நாராயணசாமி நாயுடு கோயம்புத்தூர், வையம்பாளையத்தில் வாழ்ந்த இல்லத்தைக் கையகப்படுத்தி, அதனை நினைவு இல்லமாக மாற்ற நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Provides symbolic recognition to the farming community by honoring a historical farmer leader.

promise_components.component: Acquire the house of farmer leader Ayya Narayanasamy Naidu and convert it into a memorial.
promise_components.analysis: This is a one-time expenditure. The cost of acquiring a specific private property and renovating it is not available in the reference data and cannot be estimated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is unknown but would be a one-time expense that is negligible in the context of the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a symbolic gesture. It provides no material benefit or structural change to the conditions of farming in Tamil Nadu, serving primarily as political signalling to the farming community.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to establish a Cold Storage facility in the central part of every district in Tamil Nadu for agricultural produce and dairy products. An app will be created to identify available space in these warehouses. Infrastructure will be improved so that farmers within a 10-kilometer radius can easily reach the warehouse.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்தின் மையப் பகுதியிலும் விவசாய விளைபொருட்கள் மற்றும் பால் பொருட்களுக்காக குளிர்பதனக் கிடங்கு வசதி ஏற்படுத்தப்படும். இந்த கிடங்குகளில் உள்ள காலி இடங்களைக் கண்டறிய ஒரு செயலி உருவாக்கப்படும். 10 கிலோமீட்டர் சுற்றளவில் உள்ள விவசாயிகள் எளிதில் கிடங்கை அடையும் வகையில் உள்கட்டமைப்பு மேம்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Reduces spoilage of perishable goods and improves farmer incomes by providing access to a modern cold chain infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Establish a Cold Storage facility in the central part of every district for agricultural and dairy products.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts and the capital cost per cold storage facility are not available in the reference data. The cost for the associated app and road infrastructure is also unknown. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a major capital infrastructure project. The cost is incalculable without data on the number of districts and unit construction/operational costs.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment in critical supply chain infrastructure. It addresses the root cause of post-harvest losses for perishable goods, enabling farmers to avoid distress sales and access markets more effectively.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to farmers of perishable goods located within a reasonable distance of the district's central cold storage facility.

promise_text_en: To protect harvested paddy, tarpaulin sheets will be provided at subsidized rates to small and marginal farmers.
promise_text_ta: அறுவடை செய்யப்பட்ட நெல்லைப் பாதுகாக்க, சிறு மற்றும் குறு விவசாயிகளுக்கு மானிய விலையில் தார்ப்பாய் தாள்கள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Provides a low-cost tool to mitigate the immediate risk of crop damage from weather after harvesting.

promise_components.component: Provide tarpaulin sheets at subsidized rates to small and marginal farmers.
promise_components.analysis: The target group is small and marginal farmers (~42 lakh marginal households plus an unknown number of small farmers). The unit cost of a tarpaulin, the subsidy percentage, and the uptake rate are not specified. Therefore, the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost cannot be calculated without knowing the subsidy amount per sheet and the number of beneficiaries. However, the per-unit cost is low, suggesting the overall scheme would likely be feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides a temporary, useful tool to manage a symptom (crop damage from rain). It does not address the root cause, which is the lack of permanent, covered drying and storage facilities.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes medium and large farmers who also face risks of post-harvest crop damage.

promise_text_en: Arrangements will be made for farmers and pottery workers to take alluvial soil without hindrance, with proper permission, without damaging water bodies.
promise_text_ta: விவசாயிகள் மற்றும் மட்பாண்டத் தொழிலாளர்கள் முறையான அனுமதியுடன், நீர்நிலைகளை சேதப்படுத்தாமல், தடையின்றி வண்டல் மண் எடுக்க ஏற்பாடுகள் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Reduces input costs for farmers and potters by simplifying regulatory access to a free natural resource.

promise_components.component: Arrange for farmers and pottery workers to take alluvial soil from water bodies with proper permission and without causing damage.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory and procedural change, not a direct expenditure scheme. There is no direct fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This promise involves a change in policy and administrative procedures, not a budgetary outlay.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise alters the rules of access to a productive resource. By aiming to formalize and simplify this access, it creates a long-term structural benefit, addressing the root issue of input costs and availability for specific groups.

promise_text_en: In feasible districts, with the help of respective local bodies, community wells and community borewells will be created to facilitate irrigation for agricultural lands and drinking water for the local people.
promise_text_ta: சாத்தியமான மாவட்டங்களில், அந்தந்த உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்புகளின் உதவியுடன், விவசாய நிலங்களுக்கு நீர்ப்பாசனம் மற்றும் உள்ளூர் மக்களுக்கு குடிநீர் வசதி செய்ய சமூகக் கிணறுகள் மற்றும் சமூக ஆழ்துளைக் கிணறுகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: Improves water security for agriculture and domestic consumption by creating shared, community-level water infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Create community wells and borewells in feasible districts for irrigation and drinking water.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'feasible' districts, the number of wells to be created, and the unit cost per well/borewell are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale of the program (number of wells) and the capital cost per unit are undefined, making a fiscal estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a capital investment in essential water infrastructure, addressing the fundamental problem of water scarcity. However, its long-term success is highly dependent on hydro-geological feasibility and sustainable community management to avoid groundwater depletion.
coverage_gap_note: The term 'feasible districts' implies that areas with severe water stress but poor geological conditions for wells would be excluded.

promise_text_en: Organic farming education centers will be established in colleges under the jurisdiction of the Tamil Nadu Agricultural University in the name of 'Organic Agricultural Scientist Nammalvar'. Steps will be taken to start diploma courses for this. Through this, organic farming will be encouraged, and all assistance will be provided to market organic agricultural produce.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு வேளாண் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தின் கீழ் உள்ள கல்லூரிகளில் 'இயற்கை வேளாண் விஞ்ஞானி நம்மாழ்வார்' பெயரில் இயற்கை வேளாண்மைக் கல்வி மையங்கள் நிறுவப்படும். இதற்கான பட்டயப் படிப்புகளைத் தொடங்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். இதன் மூலம் இயற்கை விவசாயம் ஊக்குவிக்கப்பட்டு, இயற்கை விவசாய விளைபொருட்களை சந்தைப்படுத்த அனைத்து உதவிகளும் வழங்கப்படும்.
scheme_name: Organic Agricultural Scientist Nammalvar education centers
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 13
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase farmer income and promote sustainable agriculture by building human capital and market linkages for organic products.

promise_components.component: Establish organic farming education centers in TNAU colleges.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating new academic infrastructure and programs. The number of colleges or cost per center is not available in the reference data, so a cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Start diploma courses in organic farming.
promise_components.analysis: This requires curriculum development, faculty, and administrative support. The cost is dependent on the scale and number of courses, which is not specified.

promise_components.component: Provide assistance to market organic agricultural produce.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'assistance' is vague and could range from marketing campaigns to setting up dedicated retail channels. The cost is therefore incalculable from the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the number of centers, scale of courses, and the nature of marketing support, none of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise focuses on building farmer capacity through education and creating market infrastructure. These are foundational changes that empower farmers with skills and market access, rather than providing temporary financial aid.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes the majority of conventional farmers who may not have the resources or inclination to switch to organic methods.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to ensure a continuous supply of three-phase electricity for irrigation.
promise_text_ta: நீர்ப்பாசனத்திற்கு தடையற்ற மும்முனை மின்சாரம் வழங்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to boost agricultural productivity by providing reliable energy for irrigation, a critical input for farming.

promise_components.component: Ensure a continuous supply of three-phase electricity for irrigation.
promise_components.analysis: This requires significant upgrades to the state's power grid infrastructure, including transformers and dedicated agricultural feeders. The cost would involve major capital expenditure by the state electricity utility, but data on the current grid deficit or upgrade costs is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would be a major capital expenditure project whose cost cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Reliable electricity is a core piece of infrastructure that enables more efficient water management and higher crop yields. This is a capital investment that provides a lasting improvement to the conditions of production for farmers.
coverage_gap_note: This does not benefit farmers in rain-fed areas or those who do not use electric pump sets for irrigation.

promise_text_en: A State Agricultural Commission will be formed to analyze the challenges in the agricultural sector, formulate immediate strategies and schemes to overcome them, make the agricultural industry more profitable, increase the income of farmers, and protect their welfare. Agricultural representatives will play a proper role in this commission.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண் துறையில் உள்ள சவால்களை ஆய்வு செய்யவும், அவற்றை சமாளிக்க உடனடி உத்திகள் மற்றும் திட்டங்களை வகுக்கவும், விவசாயத் தொழிலை லாபகரமாக்கவும், விவசாயிகளின் வருமானத்தை அதிகரிக்கவும், அவர்களின் நலனைப் பாதுகாக்கவும் ஒரு மாநில வேளாண் ஆணையம் அமைக்கப்படும். இந்த ஆணையத்தில் விவசாயப் பிரதிநிதிகள் உரிய பங்கு வகிப்பார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve agricultural policy by creating a dedicated institution for evidence-based strategy and planning.

promise_components.component: Form a State Agricultural Commission with farmer representation.
promise_components.analysis: This is an institutional reform. The direct cost involves administrative expenses for the commission's members, staff, and research activities. Such costs are typically minor in a state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: Estimated annual cost is likely minor, covering administrative expenses. This would represent a negligible fraction (<0.01%) of the discretionary budget and is highly feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a permanent, specialized body for agricultural policy can lead to more coherent and long-term strategies, moving beyond ad-hoc responses. Its ultimate success, however, depends on the government's commitment to implementing its recommendations.
coverage_gap_note: The commission itself provides no direct, tangible benefit; its impact is entirely dependent on the quality and implementation of its future recommendations.

promise_text_en: Farm mechanization will be encouraged by making farm machinery available locally at low rent. Factories for agricultural machinery will be specially set up in delta districts and other required locations. To enable farmers to easily obtain and use necessary agricultural machinery and equipment, the 'Chief Minister-Farmer Bank Scheme' will be implemented.
promise_text_ta: விவசாய இயந்திரங்களை உள்ளூரில் குறைந்த வாடகையில் கிடைக்கச் செய்வதன் மூலம் பண்ணை இயந்திரமயமாக்கல் ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும். விவசாய இயந்திரங்களுக்கான தொழிற்சாலைகள் டெல்டா மாவட்டங்கள் மற்றும் பிற தேவையான இடங்களில் சிறப்பாக அமைக்கப்படும். விவசாயிகள் தேவையான விவசாய இயந்திரங்கள் மற்றும் உபகரணங்களை எளிதில் பெற்று பயன்படுத்த 'முதலமைச்சர்-விவசாயி வங்கித் திட்டம்' செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase farm productivity and reduce costs for smallholders by improving access to expensive farm machinery.

promise_components.component: Make farm machinery available locally at low rent via the 'Chief Minister-Farmer Bank Scheme'.
promise_components.analysis: This implies establishing a network of Custom Hiring Centers. The cost involves capital expenditure for machinery and operational subsidies to ensure 'low rent'. The number of centers or machinery types is not specified.

promise_components.component: Set up factories for agricultural machinery.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major industrial undertaking requiring immense capital investment for land, plant, and technology. The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from available data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of a statewide network of machinery banks and setting up new factories would be substantial, but cannot be quantified with the given data.
sustainability_reasoning: Access to affordable mechanization is a primary barrier for small and marginal farmers. Building the physical assets (machinery banks) and industrial base (factories) to support this is a foundational change to the agricultural economy.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness hinges on the management, maintenance, and true accessibility of the machinery banks, which can be logistically challenging.

promise_text_en: To benefit farmers in the Nilgiris district, locations where vegetables and fruits are produced will be identified, and processing centers will be established there.
promise_text_ta: நீலகிரி மாவட்ட விவசாயிகளுக்குப் பயனளிக்கும் வகையில், காய்கறிகள் மற்றும் பழங்கள் உற்பத்தி செய்யப்படும் இடங்கள் கண்டறியப்பட்டு, அங்கு பதப்படுத்தும் மையங்கள் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to increase farmer income in a specific region by creating infrastructure for value addition and reducing post-harvest losses.

promise_components.component: Establish fruit and vegetable processing centers in the Nilgiris district.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure to build and equip food processing facilities. The cost depends on the number, scale, and technology of the centers, which is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is dependent on the number and scale of the processing centers, which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Processing facilities are physical infrastructure that allows farmers to capture more value from their produce and reduce waste. This creates a permanent, local capacity for value addition, directly addressing a key gap in the horticultural supply chain.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are geographically restricted to farmers in the Nilgiris district.

promise_text_en: To encourage agriculture in rain-fed lands, proper research will be conducted, and integrated farm management and improved crop cultivation methods will be popularized. 'Farmer Producer Groups' will be formed so that farmers themselves can benefit by value-adding the produce grown in rain-fed lands. Arrangements will be made for rain-fed farmers to earn income throughout the year through milch cow, goat, and poultry rearing schemes.
promise_text_ta: மானாவாரி நிலங்களில் விவசாயத்தை ஊக்குவிக்க, முறையான ஆராய்ச்சி நடத்தப்பட்டு, ஒருங்கிணைந்த பண்ணை மேலாண்மை மற்றும் மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட பயிர் சாகுபடி முறைகள் பிரபலப்படுத்தப்படும். மேலும், 'உழவர் உற்பத்தியாளர் குழுக்கள்' உருவாக்கப்பட்டு, மானாவாரி நிலங்களில் விளையும் விளைபொருட்களை மதிப்புக்கூட்டுவதன் மூலம் விவசாயிகள் தாங்களே பயனடையலாம். மானாவாரி விவசாயிகள் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் வருமானம் ஈட்ட கறவை மாடு, ஆடு, கோழி வளர்ப்புத் திட்டங்கள் மூலம் ஏற்பாடுகள் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to make agriculture in vulnerable areas more resilient by diversifying farmer income and improving collective market power.

promise_components.component: Promote integrated farm management and form 'Farmer Producer Groups' for rain-fed lands.
promise_components.analysis: This involves strengthening agricultural extension services and supporting the formation of farmer collectives (FPOs/FPGs), which is a standard and relatively low-cost intervention.

promise_components.component: Arrange for income through milch cow, goat, and poultry rearing schemes.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a livestock distribution scheme, likely with a subsidy component. The cost depends on the number of beneficiaries and the scale of the subsidy, which cannot be calculated from the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of the livestock component is unknown and could be significant depending on the scale of distribution.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a multi-pronged approach to address the root causes of distress in rain-fed agriculture. FPGs build market power, while livestock diversifies income, creating a more resilient livelihood system rather than just providing temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: This promise excludes farmers in irrigated areas and its success depends on strong backend support like veterinary services for the livestock.

promise_text_en: Subsidies provided for drip irrigation and agricultural equipment will be deposited directly into the farmers' bank accounts.
promise_text_ta: சொட்டு நீர் பாசனம் மற்றும் விவசாய உபகரணங்களுக்கு வழங்கப்படும் மானியங்கள் நேரடியாக விவசாயிகளின் வங்கிக் கணக்கில் செலுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve the efficiency and transparency of subsidy delivery to farmers.

promise_components.component: Subsidies for drip irrigation and agricultural equipment will be deposited directly into farmers' bank accounts.
promise_components.analysis: This is a process reform to implement a Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) model for existing subsidy schemes. It changes the payment channel but does not create a new expenditure.

fiscal_cost_note: No new fiscal cost. This is a change in the payment mechanism for existing subsidy programs, not a new financial commitment.
sustainability_reasoning: While DBT is a good governance practice that can reduce leakages, it is a procedural tweak to an existing symptomatic relief program. It does not alter the underlying economics of farming or the need for subsidies in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: This only affects farmers already eligible for these specific subsidies and does not expand the beneficiary base.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Central Government to include pump sets in the list of agricultural machinery equipment to reduce the GST tax rate from 18% to 5%.
promise_text_ta: விவசாய இயந்திர உபகரணங்கள் பட்டியலில் பம்ப் செட்களைச் சேர்த்து, ஜிஎஸ்டி வரி விகிதத்தை 18% லிருந்து 5% ஆகக் குறைக்க மத்திய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 14
impact_mechanism: This promise intends to lower the cost of a key agricultural input by lobbying the Central Government for a tax reduction.

promise_components.component: Urge the Central Government to reduce the GST rate on pump sets from 18% to 5%.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of advocacy, not direct state action. The power to change GST rates lies with the GST Council, not the state government. The outcome is not within the state's control.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero fiscal cost to the state government. This is an advocacy effort directed at the Central Government and the GST Council.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a political statement of intent, not a deliverable state policy. It costs the state nothing and its success is entirely contingent on a decision by another governmental body, making it primarily a signalling exercise.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to establish factories to process Neera extracted from coconut trees, sell it across the country, and enhance the livelihood of coconut farmers.
promise_text_ta: தென்னை மரங்களிலிருந்து எடுக்கப்படும் நீரா பானத்தை பதப்படுத்தி, நாடு முழுவதும் விற்பனை செய்து, தென்னை விவசாயிகளின் வாழ்வாதாரத்தை மேம்படுத்த தொழிற்சாலைகள் அமைக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to boost incomes for a specific group of farmers by creating a new value chain for a niche agricultural product.

promise_components.component: Establish factories to process Neera from coconut trees.

promise_components.component: Sell the processed Neera across the country.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a significant investment in branding, marketing, and a national distribution network, which is a complex commercial undertaking.

promise_text_en: Whenever the price of copra coconut drops, steps will be taken by the government itself to procure copra from coconut farmers.

promise_components.analysis: This is a market intervention scheme, effectively a state-level Minimum Support Price (MSP) for copra. The cost is variable and depends on the difference between the market price and the procurement price, and the quantity procured.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is contingent on market price fluctuations and could be substantial in years with a major price crash.

coverage_gap_note: This only benefits coconut farmers and does not address price volatility for other agricultural commodities.

promise_text_en: Water bodies across Tamil Nadu, specifically irrigation lakes, drinking water ponds, and canals, will be restored through the Kudimaramathu scheme, and water resources will be augmented. Kudimaramathu works will be undertaken jointly with the irrigation farmers' associations of the respective areas.

It creates a durable asset that enhances agricultural resilience and groundwater recharge for years, and community involvement can improve long-term maintenance.

promise_text_en: Seemai Karuvelam (Prosopis juliflora) trees that have proliferated in irrigation tanks and supply canals will be completely removed. Similarly, steps will be taken to reclaim riverbeds by removing Seemai Karuvelam trees that obstruct floodwater flow in the beds of major rivers.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 15
impact_mechanism: Increases water storage capacity in tanks and improves floodwater flow in rivers by removing the invasive Seemai Karuvelam species.

promise_components.component: Completely remove Seemai Karuvelam (Prosopis juliflora) from irrigation tanks, supply canals, and major riverbeds.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of removal is highly variable and depends on the total infested area and the method used. The reference data does not contain information on the extent of infestation or per-hectare removal costs. The plant's aggressive regrowth makes 'complete' removal a recurring expense. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost is unknown and potentially massive. Given the widespread nature of the invasive species and the difficulty of permanent eradication, this would be a very high, recurring expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: Removing an invasive species that degrades water resources is a structural fix to restore ecological function. However, the sustainability is challenged by the high risk of re-infestation, which would require a permanent, costly management program to maintain the benefits.

promise_text_en: To utilize the surplus water of the Mettur dam, the work of filling 100 lakes through the Sarabanga lift irrigation scheme will be completed swiftly. As the next step, the work of filling the Panamarathupatti lake in Salem will be undertaken. Furthermore, steps will be taken immediately to fulfill the irrigation and drinking water needs of the people in Yercaud, Attur, and Gangavalli assembly constituencies by linking the Vasishta river and its tributaries to fill the water bodies and lakes in that area.
promise_text_ta: மேட்டூர் அணையின் உபரி நீரைப் பயன்படுத்த, சரபங்கா நீரேற்றுப் பாசனத் திட்டம் மூலம் 100 ஏரிகளை நிரப்பும் பணி விரைந்து முடிக்கப்படும். அடுத்த கட்டமாக, சேலத்தில் உள்ள பனமரத்துப்பட்டி ஏரியை நிரப்பும் பணி மேற்கொள்ளப்படும். மேலும், ஏற்காடு, ஆத்தூர், கங்கவல்லி சட்டமன்றத் தொகுதிகளில் உள்ள மக்களின் பாசன மற்றும் குடிநீர் தேவைகளை நிறைவேற்ற, வசிஷ்ட நதி மற்றும் அதன் துணை நதிகளை இணைத்து அப்பகுதியில் உள்ள நீர்நிலைகள் மற்றும் ஏரிகளை நிரப்ப உடனடியாக நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 16
impact_mechanism: Aims to create a new water corridor to distribute surplus Mettur water across multiple river basins, significantly enhancing water availability over a large region.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 16

promise_components.component: Supply protected, uninterrupted drinking water to all Panchayat areas in Tamil Nadu.

promise_components.component: Swiftly complete the Cauvery-Vaigai-Gundar river linking project.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale, ongoing infrastructure project. The reference data does not contain the project's remaining cost, timeline, or current status. Therefore, a fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of large-scale river linking projects typically runs into thousands of crores and is often dependent on central government funding.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise involves the creation of permanent infrastructure designed to address regional water scarcity. If completed, it would create a lasting change in water distribution.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are geographically concentrated in the Vaigai and Gundar river basins, leaving out other water-scarce regions of the state.

promise_text_en: Steps will be taken to implement the Godavari-Cauvery river linking project.
promise_text_ta: கோதாவரி-காவிரி நதிகள் இணைப்புத் திட்டத்தை செயல்படுத்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 16
impact_mechanism: Transfers water from the Godavari river basin to the Cauvery basin to address long-term, large-scale water deficits in Tamil Nadu.

promise_components.component: Implement the Godavari-Cauvery river linking project.
promise_components.analysis: This is a proposed national-level, inter-state project. The reference data contains no information on its cost, which is estimated to be in the tens of thousands of crores.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This project's implementation is entirely dependent on funding from the Union Government and political agreements with multiple other states.
sustainability_reasoning: As a major inter-state water transfer project, it would create a permanent infrastructural solution to the state's macro water deficit. However, its realization is contingent on many external factors.
coverage_gap_note: The project is entirely contingent on the political and financial cooperation of the Union Government and several other states, making its implementation highly uncertain.

promise_text_en: The work to store 152 feet of water in the Mullaiperiyar dam will continue.
promise_text_ta: முல்லைப்பெரியாறு அணையில் 152 அடி நீரைத் தேக்கும் பணி தொடரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 16
impact_mechanism: Increases the dam's storage capacity to provide more water for irrigation and drinking to dependent southern districts.

promise_components.component: Continue work to store 152 feet of water in the Mullaiperiyar dam.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political and legal objective concerning an inter-state dispute, not a new spending scheme. The costs for dam strengthening or legal proceedings are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The primary barrier is political and legal, not a predictable fiscal outlay from the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is to 'continue work,' which is the existing government policy. It signals political intent but does not introduce a new, deliverable action, as the outcome is not fully within Tamil Nadu's control.
coverage_gap_note: Achieving this goal is entirely dependent on Supreme Court rulings and the agreement of the government of Kerala.

promise_text_en: Irrigation canal projects initiated by the government led by the Honorable Former Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu, Thiru. Edappadi K. Palaniswami, such as Athikadavu-Avinashi, Sarabanga, Thamirabarani-Karumeniyar, Cauvery-Gundar, Cauvery sub-basin renovation, Grand Anicut canal renovation, Lower Bhavani canal renovation, and the Ennekol, Jerthalav, and Aliyalam irrigation canal projects in Dharmapuri and Krishnagiri districts, will all be completed swiftly.
promise_text_ta: முன்னாள் முதலமைச்சர் திரு. எடப்பாடி கே. பழனிசாமி தலைமையிலான அரசால் தொடங்கப்பட்ட அத்திக்கடவு-அவிநாசி, சரபங்கா, தாமிரபரணி-கருமேனியாறு, காவிரி-குண்டாறு, காவிரி துணைப் படுகை புனரமைப்பு, கிராண்ட் அணிக்கட்டு கால்வாய் புனரமைப்பு, கீழ் பவானி கால்வாய் புனரமைப்பு, மற்றும் தர்மபுரி மற்றும் கிருஷ்ணகிரி மாவட்டங்களில் உள்ள என்னேகொல், ஜெர்தலாவ், ஆளியாளம் பாசனக் கால்வாய் திட்டங்கள் அனைத்தும் விரைந்து முடிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 16
impact_mechanism: Completes existing irrigation infrastructure to deliver water to designated agricultural lands, increasing cultivable area and crop security.

promise_components.component: Swiftly complete several specified ongoing irrigation canal projects.
promise_components.analysis: This is a commitment to complete multiple ongoing capital works projects. The reference data does not contain the remaining budgetary requirements for these specific projects.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs represent capital expenditure for ongoing projects, which are likely already budgeted. 'Swift completion' implies prioritization rather than new allocation.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise focuses on completing permanent capital assets (canals and irrigation systems). This creates a lasting structural improvement for agriculture in the targeted regions.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are highly localized to the command areas of the specific projects mentioned.

promise_text_en: Check dams will be constructed at required locations across rivers, streams, and rivulets throughout the state to recharge groundwater.
promise_text_ta: மாநிலம் முழுவதும் உள்ள ஆறுகள், ஓடைகள் மற்றும் சிற்றோடைகளின் குறுக்கே தேவையான இடங்களில் தடுப்பணைகள் கட்டப்பட்டு நிலத்தடி நீர் செறிவூட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 17
impact_mechanism: Slows surface water runoff, allowing more water to percolate into the ground and recharge depleted groundwater tables.

promise_components.component: Construct check dams at required locations across the state.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is for an unspecified number of check dams at undefined 'required locations'. The cost per dam is not available in the reference data, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost is unknown as the number of dams and cost per unit are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Check dams are permanent infrastructure that address the root cause of groundwater depletion by improving rainwater harvesting and aquifer recharge. The impact is lasting.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness of the program depends on proper scientific site selection and regular maintenance, which are not explicitly guaranteed.

promise_text_en: To advance water management in southern Tamil Nadu, a new water management project will be implemented to divert the surplus water of the Thamirabarani river to the arid regions of Thoothukudi and Tirunelveli districts.
promise_text_ta: தென் தமிழ்நாட்டில் நீர் மேலாண்மையை மேம்படுத்த, தாமிரபரணி ஆற்றின் உபரி நீரை தூத்துக்குடி மற்றும் திருநெல்வேலி மாவட்டங்களின் வறண்ட பகுதிகளுக்கு திசை திருப்ப ஒரு புதிய நீர் மேலாண்மைத் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 17
impact_mechanism: Creates new water diversion infrastructure to transfer surplus river water to nearby arid regions, improving water security.

promise_components.component: Implement a new water management project to divert surplus Thamirabarani river water to arid regions of Thoothukudi and Tirunelveli districts.
promise_components.analysis: This is a new infrastructure project. The reference data does not contain the project's design, cost, or a definition of 'surplus water'.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of a new water diversion project is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This involves building new, permanent infrastructure to re-allocate water resources. It is a long-term solution to localized water scarcity, addressing the root cause.
coverage_gap_note: Defining and diverting 'surplus' water may create new water-sharing conflicts with existing users within the Thamirabarani basin.

promise_text_en: Necessary studies will be conducted to implement the Thamirabarani-Vaippar linking project, and steps will be taken to execute this project.
promise_text_ta: தாமிரபரணி-வைப்பாறு இணைப்புத் திட்டத்தை செயல்படுத்த தேவையான ஆய்வுகள் நடத்தப்பட்டு, அதை நிறைவேற்ற நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 17
impact_mechanism: Proposes to link two river basins to transfer water, aiming to alleviate water scarcity in the Vaippar basin.

promise_components.component: Conduct studies for the Thamirabarani-Vaippar linking project and take steps to execute it.
promise_components.analysis: This is a pre-project commitment. The primary deliverable is to 'conduct studies'. The cost of the studies and the eventual project are not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of the feasibility study is unknown but small; the cost of the main project is unknown and would be very large.
sustainability_reasoning: The concrete promise is only to 'conduct studies,' a low-cost, non-binding action. It signals intent for a structural project but does not commit to the expensive and difficult execution phase.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is only for a study, which provides no guarantee that the actual water-linking project will ever be implemented.

promise_text_en: The scheme of providing free milch cows and goats, implemented by Honorable Puratchi Thalaivi Amma, has been stopped. Steps will be taken to resume this scheme on a large scale to benefit 2 lakh beneficiaries annually, aiming to improve the rural economy.
promise_text_ta: மாண்புமிகு புரட்சித் தலைவி அம்மா அவர்களால் செயல்படுத்தப்பட்ட இலவச கறவை மாடுகள் மற்றும் ஆடுகள் வழங்கும் திட்டம் நிறுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளது. கிராமப்புறப் பொருளாதாரத்தை மேம்படுத்தும் நோக்கில், ஆண்டுதோறும் 2 லட்சம் பயனாளிகளுக்குப் பயனளிக்கும் வகையில் இத்திட்டத்தை மீண்டும் பெரிய அளவில் தொடங்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
scheme_name: Free milch cows and goats scheme
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 17
impact_mechanism: Provides a productive asset (livestock) to rural households, creating a source of supplementary income and improving household nutrition.

promise_components.component: Resume the scheme of providing free milch cows and goats to 2 lakh beneficiaries annually.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies 2 lakh beneficiaries per year. However, the unit cost of a milch cow or a goat is not available in the reference data, so the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost per animal unit is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: The scheme provides an asset that offers immediate income relief, addressing a symptom of rural poverty. It does not fix underlying issues like access to markets, credit, or fodder, and the benefit depends on recurring government provision.
coverage_gap_note: The 2 lakh annual beneficiaries represent a small fraction of the ~1.2 crore BPL households or ~83 lakh farmer households in the state.

promise_text_en: The livestock park established in Thalaivasal, Salem district, will be upgraded. Through it, research activities will be conducted as planned, and a scheme to create high-yielding crossbred cows will be implemented. Furthermore, steps will be taken to make this center a crucial hub for the development of livestock production-based industries.
promise_text_ta: சேலம் மாவட்டம், தலைவாசலில் நிறுவப்பட்ட கால்நடைப் பூங்கா மேம்படுத்தப்படும். அதன் மூலம், திட்டமிட்டபடி ஆராய்ச்சிப் பணிகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்பட்டு, அதிக மகசூல் தரும் கலப்பின மாடுகளை உருவாக்கும் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும். மேலும், இந்த மையத்தை கால்நடை உற்பத்தி சார்ந்த தொழில்களின் வளர்ச்சிக்கு ஒரு முக்கிய மையமாக மாற்ற நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 17
impact_mechanism: Improves livestock productivity and fosters related industries through research, genetic improvement, and creating a centralized development hub.

promise_components.component: Upgrade the Thalaivasal livestock park for research, breeding programs, and to serve as an industrial hub.
promise_components.analysis: This promise is to enhance an existing facility. The reference data does not contain the costs for the proposed 'upgrade' or the new research and breeding schemes.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The capital and operational costs for the upgrade and new programs are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This focuses on building long-term institutional capacity for research, genetic improvement, and industrial ecosystem development. It addresses root causes of low productivity in the livestock sector.
coverage_gap_note: Direct benefits are concentrated around the park and those able to access its services, rather than being universally available to all livestock rearers.

promise_text_en: Fodder and enriched fodder kits manufactured using world-class technology will be provided to livestock rearers at special subsidized rates. Appropriate subsidies will be provided to entrepreneurs producing such enriched fodder.
promise_text_ta: உலகத் தரம் வாய்ந்த தொழில்நுட்பத்தைப் பயன்படுத்தி தயாரிக்கப்பட்ட தீவனம் மற்றும் செறிவூட்டப்பட்ட தீவனக் கருவிகள் கால்நடை வளர்ப்போருக்கு சிறப்பு மானிய விலையில் வழங்கப்படும். அத்தகைய செறிவூட்டப்பட்ட தீவனத்தை உற்பத்தி செய்யும் தொழில்முனைவோருக்கு உரிய மானியங்கள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 17
impact_mechanism: Reduces the input cost of feed for livestock rearers, thereby increasing the profitability and viability of animal husbandry.

promise_components.component: Provide fodder and enriched fodder kits at 'special subsidized rates' to livestock rearers.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is vague. The number of beneficiaries, the level of subsidy ('special'), and the base cost of a fodder kit are not defined in the reference data. A total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide 'appropriate subsidies' to entrepreneurs producing such fodder.
promise_components.analysis: The level of subsidy ('appropriate') and the number of eligible entrepreneurs are not defined. A total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of beneficiaries, subsidy percentages, and base costs are all unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a recurring subsidy to manage an operational cost (feed). It provides relief from the symptom of high input costs but does not solve the underlying structural problems of fodder availability or market structures.
coverage_gap_note: The vague terms 'special' and 'appropriate' for the subsidy create uncertainty for potential beneficiaries and producers.

promise_text_en: To ensure the 'Aavin' institution functions robustly, the production infrastructure of district milk producers' unions will be upgraded with financial assistance from 'NABARD'. Milk procurement will be increased. The 'Aavin' institution will be upgraded to produce and sell milk by-products like butter, ghee, ice cream, and cheese in large quantities to earn profits.
promise_text_ta: 'ஆவின்' நிறுவனம் சிறப்பாக செயல்படுவதை உறுதிசெய்ய, மாவட்ட பால் உற்பத்தியாளர் சங்கங்களின் உற்பத்தி உள்கட்டமைப்பு 'நபார்டு' நிதி உதவியுடன் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். பால் கொள்முதல் அதிகரிக்கப்படும். 'ஆவின்' நிறுவனம் வெண்ணெய், நெய், ஐஸ்கிரீம், சீஸ் போன்ற பால் பொருட்களை அதிக அளவில் உற்பத்தி செய்து விற்பனை செய்து லாபம் ஈட்டும் வகையில் மேம்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Improves the financial health and operational capacity of the state milk cooperative, potentially leading to better prices for producers and stable supply for consumers.

promise_components.component: Upgrade district milk producers' unions' infrastructure with financial assistance from 'NABARD'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital investment promise. The cost of upgrades and the number of unions are not specified. The financing model (loan vs. grant from NABARD) is also not detailed. Cost is incalculable as data is unavailable.

promise_components.component: Increase milk procurement.
promise_components.analysis: This is an operational goal. The target procurement increase (in liters or percentage) is not specified. The cost depends on the procurement price and volume, which are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Upgrade 'Aavin' to produce and sell more milk by-products.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for new production lines. The scale of investment is not specified. Cost is incalculable as data is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted as it lacks specifics on the scale of upgrades, procurement targets, or investment in by-product facilities. It explicitly mentions NABARD assistance, implying reliance on external funding.
sustainability_reasoning: Upgrading infrastructure and diversifying the product line are structural improvements to the business model of the cooperative. This can lead to long-term financial stability and better returns for member farmers, addressing the root cause of low profitability.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to milk producers integrated into the Aavin cooperative system, excluding independent producers.

promise_text_en: In districts where livestock wealth has decreased, infrastructure like new livestock sub-centers and veterinary dispensaries will be strengthened to multiply the wealth.
promise_text_ta: கால்நடை வளம் குறைந்த மாவட்டங்களில், புதிய கால்நடை துணை மையங்கள் மற்றும் கால்நடை மருந்தகங்கள் போன்ற உள்கட்டமைப்புகள் பலப்படுத்தப்பட்டு, கால்நடை வளம் பெருக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Increases access to veterinary care, which can reduce livestock mortality and improve animal health, thereby protecting and enhancing the asset base of farming households.

promise_components.component: Strengthen infrastructure like new livestock sub-centers and veterinary dispensaries in districts with decreased livestock wealth.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital and operational expenditure promise. The number of new centers/dispensaries and the specific districts are not defined. The cost to build and staff a facility is not available in the reference data. Therefore, a cost calculation is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The number of new facilities and their associated capital and recurring (staffing, maintenance) costs are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Animal health is a critical factor for the rural economy. Investing in veterinary infrastructure is a structural improvement that directly supports the productivity and sustainability of livestock farming, which is a primary income source for many.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are targeted only at districts identified as having decreased livestock wealth, excluding livestock owners in other areas.

promise_text_en: Service Rules will be created for the employees of Primary Milk Producers Cooperative Societies. Steps will be taken to regularize them as government-affiliated employees or cooperative employees.
promise_text_ta: தொடக்க பால் உற்பத்தியாளர் கூட்டுறவு சங்கங்களின் ஊழியர்களுக்கு சேவை விதிகள் உருவாக்கப்படும். அவர்களை அரசு சார்ந்த ஊழியர்களாகவோ அல்லது கூட்டுறவு ஊழியர்களாகவோ முறைப்படுத்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Provides job security and formal employment benefits to cooperative society employees, improving their economic stability.

promise_components.component: Create Service Rules for employees of Primary Milk Producers Cooperative Societies.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action with minimal direct cost.

promise_components.component: Regularize them as government-affiliated or cooperative employees.
promise_components.analysis: This has significant fiscal implications related to salaries, benefits, and pensions. The number of employees to be regularized is not available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. While creating rules is inexpensive, the cost of regularization (higher salaries, pensions) is unknown as the number of employees is not specified in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Formalizing employment conditions and providing a path to regularization is a structural change for the affected workforce. It addresses the root cause of precarious employment by providing job security and standardized benefits.
coverage_gap_note: This promise benefits only the employees of the milk cooperative societies, not the farmer members or other workers in the dairy sector.

promise_text_en: An accident insurance of Rs. 25 lakh will be provided to the families of fishermen who meet with accidents at sea and remain unrescued, as well as to the families of fishermen who die of illness at sea without receiving medical facilities.
promise_text_ta: கடலில் விபத்துக்குள்ளாகி மீட்கப்படாமல் இருக்கும் மீனவர்களின் குடும்பங்களுக்கும், கடலில் நோய்வாய்ப்பட்டு மருத்துவ வசதி பெறாமல் இறக்கும் மீனவர்களின் குடும்பங்களுக்கும் ரூ. 25 லட்சம் விபத்துக் காப்பீடு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Provides a significant financial safety net to the families of fishermen in the event of death or disappearance at sea, mitigating the economic shock.

promise_components.component: Provide an accident insurance of Rs. 25 lakh to families of fishermen who are unrescued after an accident at sea or die of illness at sea.
promise_components.analysis: This is an insurance scheme. The cost to the state would be the annual premium for the insurance policy. The number of fishermen to be covered and the annual incidence rate of such events are not available in the reference data, so the total premium cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The total cost depends on the insurance premium, which is determined by the number of fishermen covered and the assessed risk (annual incident rate), data for which is unavailable.
sustainability_reasoning: The insurance provides crucial financial relief to a family after a tragedy, which is a symptom of the dangerous nature of the work. It does not, however, prevent the accidents or illnesses from happening in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: The coverage is for death or disappearance only, and does not cover non-fatal injuries, disability, or loss of equipment which can also be economically devastating.

promise_text_en: Sea ambulance facilities equipped with satellite connectivity will be established to swiftly rescue fishermen who meet with accidents, fall ill, or go missing while engaged in fishing at sea, and to provide them with immediate medical facilities.
promise_text_ta: கடலில் மீன்பிடிக்கும் போது விபத்துக்குள்ளாகும், நோய்வாய்ப்படும் அல்லது காணாமல் போகும் மீனவர்களை விரைவாக மீட்கவும், அவர்களுக்கு உடனடி மருத்துவ வசதிகளை வழங்கவும் செயற்கைக்கோள் இணைப்புடன் கூடிய கடல் ஆம்புலன்ஸ் வசதிகள் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Creates a rapid medical response system to reduce deaths and serious health complications from accidents and illnesses occurring at sea.

promise_components.component: Establish sea ambulance facilities with satellite connectivity.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital and operational expenditure promise. The number of sea ambulances to be established is not specified. The cost to procure, equip, staff, and operate such a specialized vessel is not available in the reference data. Therefore, a cost calculation is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The number of sea ambulances and their high capital and recurring operational costs are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses a root cause of mortality at sea: the delay in receiving medical attention. Establishing a permanent emergency response infrastructure is a structural solution to improve safety outcomes.
coverage_gap_note: Effectiveness is dependent on the number of ambulances and their operational range, potentially leaving fishermen in very remote deep-sea areas underserved.

promise_text_en: A Fishermen Rescue Team will be established to rescue fishermen and fishing boats affected at sea. Furthermore, towing boat facilities will be established to rescue mechanized boats and country boats when they break down and get stranded mid-sea.
promise_text_ta: கடலில் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட மீனவர்களையும் மீன்பிடிப் படகுகளையும் மீட்க மீனவர் மீட்புக் குழு அமைக்கப்படும். மேலும், பழுதடைந்து நடுக்கடலில் தவிக்கும் இயந்திரப் படகுகள் மற்றும் நாட்டுப் படகுகளை மீட்க இழுவைப் படகு வசதிகள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Reduces the risk of loss of life and expensive fishing assets (boats) by creating a dedicated service for rescue and recovery operations.

promise_components.component: Establish a Fishermen Rescue Team.
promise_components.analysis: This involves recurring personnel costs. The size of the team is not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Establish towing boat facilities to rescue stranded boats.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for specialized towing vessels and recurring operational costs. The number of boats is not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The size of the rescue team and the number of towing boats are not specified, making it impossible to estimate the capital and operational expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates permanent infrastructure and a dedicated service to mitigate a key operational risk (equipment failure at sea). It structurally reduces the risk of loss of life and capital assets (boats), addressing a root problem of safety and economic stability for fishermen.

promise_text_en: Powerful telecommunication centers will be established in coastal districts to provide information to fishermen staying and fishing in the deep sea. Furthermore, radio telephones will be provided to deep-sea mechanized fishing boats.
promise_text_ta: கடலோர மாவட்டங்களில் சக்திவாய்ந்த தொலைத்தொடர்பு மையங்கள் நிறுவப்பட்டு, ஆழ்கடலில் தங்கி மீன்பிடிக்கும் மீனவர்களுக்கு தகவல் வழங்கப்படும். மேலும், ஆழ்கடல் இயந்திரமயமாக்கப்பட்ட மீன்பிடிப் படகுகளுக்கு ரேடியோ தொலைபேசிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 18
impact_mechanism: Enhances safety at sea by enabling reliable communication for weather alerts, distress calls, and coordination, reducing the risk of being caught in bad weather.

promise_components.component: Establish powerful telecommunication centers in coastal districts.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital infrastructure promise. The number of centers is not specified, and the cost per center is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Provide radio telephones to deep-sea mechanized fishing boats.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for equipment. The number of eligible deep-sea boats is not available in the reference data, nor is the cost per radio telephone.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. Key data such as the number of telecom centers, the number of deep-sea boats, and the cost of the equipment are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Lack of reliable communication is a root cause of fishermen getting caught in bad weather or being unable to call for help. Establishing permanent communication infrastructure is a structural solution to this safety problem.
coverage_gap_note: The promise specifies providing radios to 'deep-sea mechanized fishing boats,' which may exclude smaller country boats that also face communication challenges.

promise_text_en: Integrated Fishing Harbours will be established at required locations in coastal districts. These fishing harbours will be equipped with all necessary facilities.
promise_text_ta: கடலோர மாவட்டங்களில் தேவையான இடங்களில் ஒருங்கிணைந்த மீன்பிடித் துறைமுகங்கள் நிறுவப்படும். இந்த மீன்பிடித் துறைமுகங்கள் தேவையான அனைத்து வசதிகளுடன் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: Provides critical landing, processing, and marketing infrastructure, which can reduce post-harvest losses, improve hygiene, and increase the value realized by fishermen for their catch.

promise_components.component: Establish Integrated Fishing Harbours with all necessary facilities at required locations in coastal districts.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major capital infrastructure promise. The number of harbours is undefined ('at required locations'). The cost to build a modern harbour is extremely high and is not available in the reference data. A cost calculation is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The number and scale of the harbours are not defined, but such projects typically cost hundreds of crores each and would represent a very large fiscal commitment.
sustainability_reasoning: Fishing harbours are foundational economic infrastructure. They address root causes of low income such as post-harvest losses, lack of cold storage, and inefficient market access, enabling long-term economic improvement for the entire local industry.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are geographically concentrated, primarily helping fishing communities in the direct vicinity of the new harbours.

promise_text_en: The subsidized diesel provided monthly to fishermen will be increased to 500 liters. 4000 liters of tax-free fuel will be provided per month for the fishing industry.
promise_text_ta: மீனவர்களுக்கு மாதந்தோறும் வழங்கப்படும் மானிய டீசல் 500 லிட்டராக உயர்த்தப்படும். மீன்பிடித் தொழிலுக்கு மாதந்தோறும் 4000 லிட்டர் வரி இல்லாத எரிபொருள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: Reduces the primary operational cost for fishermen, thereby increasing their net income per trip.

promise_components.component: Increase subsidized diesel provided monthly to fishermen to 500 liters.
promise_components.analysis: This is a recurring subsidy. The cost cannot be calculated as the number of eligible fishermen/boats and the subsidy amount per liter are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Provide 4000 liters of tax-free fuel per month for the fishing industry.
promise_components.analysis: This is a recurring tax expenditure. The eligibility criteria ('fishing industry') are ambiguous. The number of beneficiaries and the tax component per liter of fuel are not available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The total cost is dependent on the number of beneficiaries, the subsidy amount per liter, and the tax component of fuel, none of which are available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This subsidy provides immediate and significant relief from high operational costs, which is a symptom of fuel price volatility. However, it does not address the underlying dependence on fossil fuels or market price fluctuations.
coverage_gap_note: The distinction in eligibility between the 500-liter and 4000-liter promise is unclear and could lead to implementation challenges.

promise_text_en: To improve the economy of the fishing community, Fishermen Cooperative Societies will be strengthened. Furthermore, to purchase modern boats and equipment, subsidized loan facilities will be provided through fishermen societies for fishermen to operate individually or as groups.
promise_text_ta: மீனவ சமூகத்தின் பொருளாதாரத்தை மேம்படுத்த, மீனவர் கூட்டுறவு சங்கங்கள் பலப்படுத்தப்படும். மேலும், நவீன படகுகள் மற்றும் உபகரணங்களை வாங்க, மீனவர்கள் தனித்தனியாகவோ அல்லது குழுக்களாகவோ செயல்பட மீனவர் சங்கங்கள் மூலம் மானியக் கடன் வசதிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: Enables fishermen to access affordable credit to upgrade their capital assets (boats, nets), leading to improved efficiency, safety, and catching capacity.

promise_components.component: Strengthen Fishermen Cooperative Societies.
promise_components.analysis: This is a vague administrative goal with no quantifiable cost.

promise_components.component: Provide subsidized loan facilities through fishermen societies for purchasing modern boats and equipment.
promise_components.analysis: This is an interest subvention scheme. The cost to the government is the difference between the market interest rate and the subsidized rate. The total loan corpus, number of beneficiaries, and interest subsidy percentage are not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is uncosted. The cost would be the annual interest subvention paid by the government, which depends on the total value of loans disbursed and the subsidy rate, both of which are undefined.
sustainability_reasoning: Access to affordable capital for asset modernization is a structural solution to low productivity and poor safety. It addresses the root problem of being unable to invest in better technology, which can permanently improve income potential.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are restricted to fishermen who are members of cooperative societies, potentially excluding independent operators.

promise_text_en: Considering the welfare of inland fishermen, a special scheme will be implemented to encourage fish farming in lakes and ponds. To enable inland fishermen to fish in ponds and rivers without difficulty, nets and equipment will be provided free of cost through Fishermen Cooperative Societies.
promise_text_ta: உள்நாட்டு மீனவர்களின் நலனைக் கருத்தில் கொண்டு, ஏரிகள் மற்றும் குளங்களில் மீன் வளர்ப்பை ஊக்குவிக்க ஒரு சிறப்புத் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும். உள்நாட்டு மீனவர்கள் சிரமமின்றி குளங்கள் மற்றும் ஆறுகளில் மீன் பிடிக்க, மீனவர் கூட்டுறவு சங்கங்கள் மூலம் வலைகள் மற்றும் உபகரணங்கள் இலவசமாக வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase the income of inland fishermen by providing productive assets (nets, equipment) and encouraging aquaculture.

promise_components.component: A special scheme will be implemented to encourage fish farming in lakes and ponds.
promise_components.analysis: The nature of the 'encouragement' (e.g., subsidy, training) is not specified. The cost is therefore incalculable.

promise_components.component: Nets and equipment will be provided free of cost to inland fishermen through Fishermen Cooperative Societies.
promise_components.analysis: The number of inland fishermen and the cost of nets and equipment are not available in the reference data. The total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specific details on the number of beneficiaries and the cost of equipment or scheme incentives, making a fiscal estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise provides capital goods and promotes a productive activity (aquaculture), which can create lasting improvements in income. It addresses the lack of equipment and alternative income sources for inland fishermen.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to inland fishermen and does not cover marine fishermen.

promise_text_en: Biometric cards will be issued to fisherwomen to ensure they fully receive welfare schemes. Fish producer groups will be formed through fisherwomen self-help groups, and arrangements will be made for them to receive all concessions similar to self-help groups and farmer producer groups.
promise_text_ta: மீனவப் பெண்கள் நலத்திட்டங்களை முழுமையாகப் பெறுவதை உறுதிசெய்ய அவர்களுக்கு பயோமெட்ரிக் அட்டைகள் வழங்கப்படும். மீனவப் பெண்கள் சுயஉதவிக்குழுக்கள் மூலம் மீன் உற்பத்தியாளர் குழுக்கள் உருவாக்கப்பட்டு, சுயஉதவிக்குழுக்கள் மற்றும் உழவர் உற்பத்தியாளர் குழுக்களுக்கு இணையான அனைத்து சலுகைகளையும் அவர்கள் பெற ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: This seeks to formalize the economic identity of fisherwomen and integrate them into organized producer groups to improve their access to credit and markets.

promise_components.component: Biometric cards will be issued to fisherwomen to ensure they fully receive welfare schemes.
promise_components.analysis: The number of fisherwomen in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data, and the unit cost of a biometric card system is not specified. The cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Fish producer groups will be formed through fisherwomen self-help groups, with concessions similar to other SHGs.
promise_components.analysis: This leverages the existing SHG network (~63 lakh women members, though not all are fisherwomen). The financial value of 'concessions' is not defined, so the cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The primary costs are administrative (biometric cards) and the undefined value of 'concessions'. A fiscal estimate is not possible.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating formal identities (biometric cards) and organized economic units (producer groups), this promise aims to fix systemic issues of exclusion and lack of market power. It builds on the existing SHG framework for lasting impact.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are specific to fisherwomen and do not extend to fishermen or women in other unorganized sectors.

promise_text_en: To prevent the livelihoods of fishermen from being affected during severe floods, all estuaries will be desilted, stabilized, and widened. Steps will be taken to establish fishing harbours with all facilities at required locations.
promise_text_ta: கடும் வெள்ளத்தின் போது மீனவர்களின் வாழ்வாதாரம் பாதிக்கப்படுவதைத் தடுக்க, அனைத்து முகத்துவாரங்களும் தூர்வாரப்பட்டு, நிலைப்படுத்தப்பட்டு, அகலப்படுத்தப்படும். தேவையான இடங்களில் அனைத்து வசதிகளுடன் கூடிய மீன்பிடித் துறைமுகங்கள் அமைக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to protect fishermen's livelihoods and assets by building resilient coastal infrastructure.

promise_components.component: All estuaries will be desilted, stabilized, and widened to prevent livelihood impact during floods.
promise_components.analysis: The number of estuaries and the cost per unit for desilting, stabilization, and widening are not available in the reference data. This represents a major, unquantifiable capital expenditure.

promise_components.component: Fishing harbours with all facilities will be established at required locations.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'required locations' and the cost to build a modern fishing harbour are not available in the reference data. This is a significant, unquantifiable capital expenditure.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. These are large-scale capital infrastructure projects. Without details on the number of estuaries and harbours or unit costs, a fiscal estimate is impossible. The cost would likely be in the thousands of crores.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a fundamental infrastructure deficit. Properly maintained estuaries and modern harbours are permanent assets that reduce risk, improve safety, and enhance productivity for the fishing industry.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in coastal fishing communities, excluding inland areas.

promise_text_en: Modern fish processing centers, modern fish markets, and green fish markets will be created at fish landing centers to safely store the fish caught by fishermen.
promise_text_ta: மீன் இறங்கு மையங்களில் மீனவர்கள் பிடிக்கும் மீன்களைப் பாதுகாப்பாக சேமித்து வைக்க நவீன மீன் பதப்படுத்தும் மையங்கள், நவீன மீன் சந்தைகள் மற்றும் பசுமை மீன் சந்தைகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 19
impact_mechanism: This aims to increase fishermen's income by creating post-harvest infrastructure to reduce spoilage and improve market access.

promise_components.component: Modern fish processing centers will be created at fish landing centers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of fish landing centers and the cost to build a modern processing center are not available in the reference data. The total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Modern fish markets and green fish markets will be created at fish landing centers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of markets to be built and the cost per market are not specified in the reference data. The total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. As a capital infrastructure promise, the cost depends on the number and scale of the facilities, which are not defined. A fiscal estimate is not possible.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a key gap in the value chain. By providing infrastructure for storage and processing, it helps fishermen capture more value from their catch, tackling the root cause of income loss due to spoilage.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are focused on fishermen at landing centers and may not extend to the wider retail chain.

promise_text_en: A monthly pension of Rs. 2,500 will be provided to fishermen above 65 years of age through the Fishermen Welfare Board.
promise_text_ta: மீனவர் நல வாரியம் மூலம் 65 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட மீனவர்களுக்கு மாதந்தோறும் ரூ.2,500 ஓய்வூதியம் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 20
impact_mechanism: This provides direct income support to elderly fishermen to ensure a basic level of social security in old age.

promise_components.component: A monthly pension of Rs. 2,500 will be provided to fishermen above 65 years of age.
promise_components.analysis: The pension amount is ₹2,500 per month, which equals ₹30,000 per year per beneficiary. The number of eligible fishermen over 65 is not available in the reference data, so the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost is ₹30,000 multiplied by the number of eligible fishermen, which is an unknown figure. Therefore, the total fiscal impact cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a cash transfer that provides crucial relief from old-age poverty. However, it treats the symptom (lack of income) rather than the root causes, such as low lifetime earnings and the absence of a formal pension system for informal workers.
coverage_gap_note: The pension is specified for 'fishermen', which may exclude fisherwomen, and is limited to those over 65.

promise_text_en: The medical admission reservation for government school students will be increased from 7.5 percent to 10 percent.
promise_text_ta: அரசுப் பள்ளி மாணவர்களுக்கான மருத்துவ மாணவர் சேர்க்கை இடஒதுக்கீடு 7.5 சதவீதத்தில் இருந்து 10 சதவீதமாக உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 20
impact_mechanism: This policy change aims to improve equity in higher education by increasing access to medical colleges for students from government schools.

promise_components.component: The medical admission reservation for government school students will be increased from 7.5 percent to 10 percent.
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-financial policy change. It reallocates a small percentage of existing medical seats. There is no direct cost to the state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a reservation policy that reallocates opportunities rather than requiring new expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy structurally alters the admission criteria to correct for the systemic disadvantages faced by government school students in competitive entrance exams. It directly addresses an issue of unequal access to opportunity.
coverage_gap_note: This benefits only the small number of government school students who score high enough for medical admission; it does not address the underlying quality of school education for all.

promise_text_en: Special steps will be taken to improve the learning and reading skills of students, specifically mathematical and language skills, in primary and high school education. 'STEM learning' centers will be established to stimulate scientific interest in high school and higher secondary classes.
promise_text_ta: தொடக்க மற்றும் உயர்நிலைப் பள்ளிகளில் மாணவர்களின் கற்றல் மற்றும் வாசிப்புத் திறனை, குறிப்பாக கணிதம் மற்றும் மொழித் திறனை மேம்படுத்த சிறப்பு நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும். உயர்நிலை மற்றும் மேல்நிலைப் வகுப்புகளில் அறிவியல் ஆர்வத்தைத் தூண்டும் வகையில் 'STEM கற்றல்' மையங்கள் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 20
impact_mechanism: This seeks to improve the quality of public education by strengthening foundational skills and fostering an interest in science and technology.

promise_components.component: Special steps will be taken to improve the learning and reading skills of students, specifically mathematical and language skills.
promise_components.analysis: 'Special steps' is a vague commitment without specific programs or funding attached. The cost is incalculable.

promise_components.component: 'STEM learning' centers will be established to stimulate scientific interest in high school and higher secondary classes.
promise_components.analysis: The number of STEM centers to be established and the cost per center are not specified. With ~53,000 government schools, the potential cost is large but cannot be calculated from the available data.
