fiscal_cost_note: The total cost cannot be calculated as the cost per unit and the number of houses to be built are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing a permanent physical asset that combines living and working space addresses a fundamental infrastructural deficit for many weavers. This improves quality of life, work efficiency, and provides a tangible asset, representing a long-term, structural improvement in their condition.
coverage_gap_note: Due to the high per-unit cost of housing, this scheme is likely to benefit only a very small fraction of the total weaver population.

Neither the reward structure nor the total production value is available in the reference data, so a cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The annual cost cannot be calculated as the reward mechanism and the total value of sarees produced are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a performance-based subsidy. While it may encourage a shift towards higher-value products, it functions as a top-up to market-determined prices and creates a recurring fiscal outlay. It does not fix the underlying market structure or input cost issues.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is limited to handloom weavers who produce sarees, excluding those who weave other products like dhotis, towels, or fabric.

promise_text_en: World-class government animal shelters and veterinary hospitals will be established in every district to rescue and care for destitute and straying voiceless animals (dogs, cows). Laws against animal cruelty will be made stricter.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் ஆதரவற்ற மற்றும் தெருவில் திரியும் வாயில்லா ஜீவன்களை (நாய்கள், மாடுகள்) மீட்டுப் பராமரிக்க உலகத் தரம் வாய்ந்த அரசு விலங்குகள் காப்பகங்கள் மற்றும் கால்நடை மருத்துவமனைகள் நிறுவப்படும். விலங்குகள் மீதான கொடுமைகளுக்கு எதிரான சட்டங்கள் கடுமையாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 42
impact_mechanism: Provides dedicated infrastructure and legal framework to improve the welfare of stray and destitute animals.

promise_components.component: Establish world-class government animal shelters and veterinary hospitals in every district.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu is not provided in the reference data, nor is the cost to build and operate a 'world-class' facility. Therefore, the cost is incalculable. This would be a significant capital and recurring expenditure for staffing and maintenance.

promise_components.component: Laws against animal cruelty will be made stricter.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action. The direct fiscal cost is minimal, though enforcement may require additional resources for policing and judicial systems, the cost of which is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost for establishing shelters and hospitals cannot be calculated as the number of districts and per-unit cost are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Building shelters manages the population of existing stray animals, which is a symptom of the problem. It does not address the root causes, such as uncontrolled breeding or pet abandonment, which lead to animals becoming strays in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: The primary beneficiaries are animals and animal welfare groups, not the general human population directly.

promise_text_en: Solutions will be found for the problems caused by street dogs across Tamil Nadu. Furthermore, a special sterilization program will be implemented to control the breeding of street dogs.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு முழுவதும் தெருநாய்களால் ஏற்படும் பிரச்சனைகளுக்கு தீர்வு காணப்படும். மேலும், தெருநாய்களின் இனப்பெருக்கத்தைக் கட்டுப்படுத்த சிறப்பு கருத்தடைத் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 42
impact_mechanism: Aims to control the street dog population through a systematic sterilization program, addressing public health and safety concerns.

promise_components.component: Solutions will be found for the problems caused by street dogs across Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad statement of intent with no specific, measurable action defined.

promise_components.component: A special sterilization program will be implemented to control the breeding of street dogs.
promise_components.analysis: The number of street dogs in Tamil Nadu and the cost per sterilization procedure are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost of the program cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost cannot be estimated without data on the target animal population and the cost per sterilization.
sustainability_reasoning: Sterilization directly targets the root cause of the street dog problem, which is uncontrolled population growth. A successful, large-scale program can lead to a sustainable reduction in the stray population over time.
coverage_gap_note: The direct focus is on street dogs, not other stray animals mentioned in other promises.

promise_text_en: All possible measures, including identifying bonded labour, rescue, rehabilitation, legal assistance, and creating a related database, will be undertaken to make Tamil Nadu a state free from the bonded labour system.
promise_text_ta: கொத்தடிமைத் தொழிலாளர்களைக் கண்டறிதல், மீட்பு, மறுவாழ்வு, சட்ட உதவி மற்றும் தொடர்புடைய தரவுத்தளத்தை உருவாக்குதல் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து நடவடிக்கைகளும் எடுக்கப்பட்டு, தமிழ்நாட்டை கொத்தடிமை இல்லாத மாநிலமாக மாற்ற நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Strengthens state enforcement and support systems to identify, free, and rehabilitate victims of an illegal and exploitative labor system.

promise_components.component: Identify, rescue, and rehabilitate bonded labour.
promise_components.analysis: The number of individuals in bonded labour in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data, nor is the per-person cost for rescue and rehabilitation. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide legal assistance and create a related database.
promise_components.analysis: The cost for legal aid and database creation depends on the scale of the problem, which is not quantified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is entirely dependent on the number of bonded labourers identified, which is not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the dismantling of the bonded labour system itself, which is a root cause of extreme exploitation and lack of freedom. It aims to create a permanent change in the state's social and economic landscape by enforcing fundamental rights.
coverage_gap_note: Focuses specifically on bonded labour, not other forms of exploitative work or child labour.

promise_text_en: The number of Christians undertaking the holy pilgrimage to Jerusalem will be increased, and their travel subsidy amount will be increased.
promise_text_ta: ஜெருசலேமுக்கு புனித யாத்திரை மேற்கொள்ளும் கிறிஸ்தவர்களின் எண்ணிக்கை அதிகரிக்கப்படும், மேலும் அவர்களுக்கான பயண மானியத் தொகையும் அதிகரிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Provides a targeted financial subsidy to make a religious pilgrimage more affordable for members of the Christian community.

promise_components.component: The number of Christians undertaking the holy pilgrimage to Jerusalem will be increased.
promise_components.analysis: The current number of beneficiaries and the proposed increase are not specified in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Their travel subsidy amount will be increased.
promise_components.analysis: The current subsidy amount and the proposed increase are not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specific figures for the increase in beneficiaries or the subsidy amount, making a cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct subsidy for a specific, non-essential activity. It provides financial relief for a personal expense but does not address any underlying economic or social problem.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is exclusive to Christians undertaking a specific pilgrimage and excludes all other citizens.

promise_text_en: For the holy Hajj pilgrimage of Muslims, the number of beneficiaries will be increased, and additional funds will be provided for their travel expenses. Furthermore, an additional subsidy will be provided for the "Umrah" (Mecca-Medina) pilgrimage.
promise_text_ta: முஸ்லிம்களின் புனித ஹஜ் பயணத்திற்கு பயனாளிகளின் எண்ணிக்கை அதிகரிக்கப்படும், மேலும் அவர்களின் பயணச் செலவுகளுக்கு கூடுதல் நிதி வழங்கப்படும். மேலும், 'உம்ரா' (மக்கா-மதினா) யாத்திரைக்கும் கூடுதல் மானியம் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Provides a targeted financial subsidy to make religious pilgrimages more affordable for members of the Muslim community.

promise_components.component: For the holy Hajj pilgrimage of Muslims, the number of beneficiaries will be increased, and additional funds will be provided.
promise_components.analysis: The current number of beneficiaries, current funding, and the proposed increases are not specified in the reference data.

promise_components.component: An additional subsidy will be provided for the 'Umrah' (Mecca-Medina) pilgrimage.
promise_components.analysis: The number of potential beneficiaries and the subsidy amount for Umrah are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise does not provide any specific numbers for the increase in beneficiaries, funding, or new subsidy amounts, making a cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct subsidy for a religious activity. It offers financial relief for a personal expense but does not address any structural issue related to income or opportunity.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is exclusive to Muslims undertaking specific pilgrimages and excludes all other citizens.

promise_text_en: Land facilities will be provided to establish cemeteries for Christians and Kabristans for Muslims.
promise_text_ta: கிறிஸ்தவர்களுக்கான கல்லறைகள் மற்றும் முஸ்லிம்களுக்கான கபரிஸ்தான்கள் அமைக்க நில வசதிகள் செய்து தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Addresses a critical lack of community infrastructure by allocating state land for burial grounds.

promise_components.component: Land facilities will be provided to establish cemeteries for Christians and Kabristans for Muslims.
promise_components.analysis: The amount of land required, the number of locations, and the cost of land acquisition are not specified in the reference data. Land costs vary significantly across the state, making a cost estimate impossible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of land acquisition is highly variable and the scale of the requirement is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing land for burial grounds is a permanent solution to a fundamental community need. It creates a lasting piece of social infrastructure, addressing the root problem of land scarcity for this purpose.
coverage_gap_note: Addresses the needs of only Christian and Muslim communities, not other groups who may face similar issues.

promise_text_en: Firm steps will be taken to retrieve Katchatheevu, which was the dream of Puratchi Thalaivi Amma.
promise_text_ta: புரட்சித் தலைவி அம்மாவின் கனவான கச்சத்தீவை மீட்க உறுதியான நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Aims to influence national foreign policy through political advocacy, with the goal of restoring access to a disputed territory.

promise_components.component: Firm steps will be taken to retrieve Katchatheevu.
promise_components.analysis: The retrieval of Katchatheevu is a matter of international treaty between India and Sri Lanka, which falls under the exclusive domain of the Union Government. The state government can only engage in political advocacy and cannot execute this directly.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state budget. The 'firm steps' are political and diplomatic in nature, not financial.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government of Tamil Nadu does not have the constitutional authority to negotiate or alter international treaties. This promise is a political statement of intent and advocacy towards the central government, not a deliverable state policy.
coverage_gap_note: The primary intended beneficiaries are fishermen in a specific coastal region.

promise_text_en: Arrangements will be made to provide the Poojari Family Welfare Fund without discrimination. Furthermore, the Poojari pension will be increased.
promise_text_ta: பூஜாரி குடும்ப நல நிதி பாரபட்சமின்றி வழங்க ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும். மேலும், பூஜாரி ஓய்வூதியம் உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Provides increased direct financial support to a specific occupational group through an enhanced pension and welfare fund.

promise_components.component: Arrangements will be made to provide the Poojari Family Welfare Fund without discrimination.
promise_components.analysis: The number of beneficiaries and the financial details of the fund are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: The Poojari pension will be increased.
promise_components.analysis: The number of Poojaris receiving a pension, the current pension amount, and the proposed increase are not specified in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of beneficiaries and the quantum of the financial increase are not specified, making a cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: Increasing a pension is a form of income support that provides relief from financial hardship. It does not address the root causes of low or unstable income for this occupational group.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is exclusive to Hindu temple priests (Poojaris) and excludes religious functionaries of other faiths.

promise_text_en: Traditional folk arts like Salangaiyattam, Valli Kummi, Paraiyattam, Pampai Attam, and Karagattam will be documented and encouraged by the government.
promise_text_ta: சலங்கையாட்டம், வள்ளி கும்மி, பறையாட்டம், பம்பை ஆட்டம், கரகாட்டம் போன்ற பாரம்பரிய நாட்டுப்புறக் கலைகள் ஆவணப்படுத்தப்பட்டு அரசால் ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Preserves and promotes intangible cultural heritage by creating official records and providing state support to artists.

promise_components.component: Traditional folk arts like Salangaiyattam, Valli Kummi, Paraiyattam, Pampai Attam, and Karagattam will be documented.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of documentation (archiving, research, video recording) is not specified.

promise_components.component: These arts will be encouraged by the government.
promise_components.analysis: The financial outlay for 'encouragement' (e.g., grants, festivals, training programs) is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scope and budget for this cultural preservation initiative are not defined. The cost is likely to be minor relative to the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Documenting and promoting traditional arts addresses the root cause of their potential extinction: the loss of knowledge and lack of patronage. This creates a permanent cultural repository and can help sustain the livelihoods of artists.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are focused on practitioners and preservers of specific, named folk art forms.

promise_text_en: World-class sports training and sports stadiums will be established in every zone. Furthermore, steps will be taken to provide free sports equipment to encourage the sporting interest of youth in Panchayat areas.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு மண்டலத்திலும் உலகத்தரம் வாய்ந்த விளையாட்டுப் பயிற்சி மற்றும் விளையாட்டு அரங்கங்கள் நிறுவப்படும். மேலும், பஞ்சாயத்து பகுதிகளில் உள்ள இளைஞர்களின் விளையாட்டு ஆர்வத்தை ஊக்குவிக்க இலவச விளையாட்டு உபகரணங்கள் வழங்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Develops human capital and public health by building sports infrastructure and providing equipment to foster sports from the grassroots level.

promise_components.component: World-class sports training and sports stadiums will be established in every zone.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'zones' is not defined in the reference data, and the cost per 'world-class' stadium is not specified. This represents a major, unquantifiable capital expenditure.

promise_components.component: Steps will be taken to provide free sports equipment to encourage the sporting interest of youth in Panchayat areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of Panchayats, the number of youth, and the cost of equipment are not available in the reference data. The cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This promise involves major capital expenditure for stadiums and widespread distribution of equipment, but key variables like the number of units and cost per unit are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating permanent infrastructure (stadiums) and providing access to resources (equipment) addresses the fundamental barriers to sports participation. This is a long-term investment in public health and youth development.
coverage_gap_note: While broad, the focus is on youth, and the quality of access may differ between urban 'zones' and rural 'Panchayat areas'.

promise_text_en: We will urge the swift establishment of a Supreme Court bench in Chennai.
promise_text_ta: சென்னையில் உச்ச நீதிமன்றக் கிளை விரைவாக அமைக்க வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Improves access to the highest court for citizens in southern India by reducing travel time, cost, and logistical barriers.

promise_components.component: Urge the swift establishment of a Supreme Court bench in Chennai.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political and administrative demand directed at the Union Government and the Supreme Court of India. It carries no direct financial cost for the Tamil Nadu state budget. Implementation requires a constitutional amendment and the concurrence of the Supreme Court.

fiscal_cost_note: ₹0. The costs for establishing and running a Supreme Court bench would be borne by the Union Government, not the state.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the root cause of geographic inaccessibility to the nation's apex court for people in southern states. If implemented, it would be a permanent change to the judicial infrastructure.
coverage_gap_note: While benefiting all of southern India, the direct beneficiaries are litigants and lawyers involved in Supreme Court cases.

promise_text_en: We will urge the Central Government to grant "Dual Citizenship" to Sri Lankan Tamil refugees living in India.
promise_text_ta: இந்தியாவில் வாழும் இலங்கைத் தமிழ் அகதிகளுக்கு 'இரட்டைக் குடியுரிமை' வழங்க மத்திய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 43
impact_mechanism: Aims to provide legal status, rights, and a path to formal integration for Sri Lankan Tamil refugees living in a state of protracted statelessness.

promise_components.component: Urge the Central Government to grant 'Dual Citizenship' to Sri Lankan Tamil refugees.
promise_components.analysis: This is a foreign policy and citizenship matter, which falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the Union Government. The Indian Constitution currently does not permit dual citizenship, so this would require a major legal and policy shift at the national level.

fiscal_cost_note: ₹0. This is a policy advocacy promise with no direct cost to the state budget. All associated costs would be a central government responsibility.
sustainability_reasoning: Granting citizenship is a permanent, structural solution that resolves the legal limbo and lack of rights faced by refugees. It addresses the root cause of their statelessness within India.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is specific to Sri Lankan Tamil refugees and does not apply to other refugee or stateless populations.

promise_text_en: The travel concession fare will be increased for those undertaking Hindu spiritual pilgrimages to temples like Mount Kailash - Mansarovar, Muktinath in Nepal, Haridwar, and Vaishno Devi in Jammu-Katra.
promise_text_ta: கைலாஷ் - மானசரோவர், நேபாளத்தில் உள்ள முக்திநாத், ஹரித்வார், மற்றும் ஜம்மு-காஷ்மீரில் உள்ள வைஷ்ணோ தேவி போன்ற இந்துக் கோயில்களுக்கு ஆன்மீகப் பயணம் மேற்கொள்பவர்களுக்கான பயணக் கட்டணச் சலுகை அதிகரிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Reduces the out-of-pocket travel expenses for individuals undertaking specific, long-distance Hindu religious pilgrimages.

promise_components.component: Increase the travel concession fare for Hindu spiritual pilgrimages to specified locations.
promise_components.analysis: This promise aims to enhance an existing subsidy. The cost cannot be calculated as the number of beneficiaries, the current subsidy amount, and the proposed increase are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost depends on the number of pilgrims and the quantum of the increase, neither of which is specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides financial relief for a specific activity but does not address the underlying high cost of travel or the financial status of the pilgrims. It's a subsidy that manages a symptom (high cost) for a select group.
coverage_gap_note: The benefit is limited to Hindus undertaking pilgrimages to four specific locations, excluding other pilgrimages and other faiths.

promise_text_en: The Annadhanam scheme currently implemented in temples will be further expanded.
promise_text_ta: தற்போது கோயில்களில் செயல்படுத்தப்படும் அன்னதானத் திட்டம் மேலும் விரிவுபடுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Provides immediate food relief to devotees and the needy within temple premises by increasing the scale of the free meal program.

promise_components.component: The Annadhanam scheme in temples will be further expanded.
promise_components.analysis: This involves increasing the number of temples offering free food or the number of meals served under an existing scheme. The scale of expansion is not defined, so a cost cannot be estimated. The scheme is typically managed by the state's HR&CE department.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is dependent on the undefined scale of expansion (number of additional meals per day).
sustainability_reasoning: The scheme provides direct and valuable relief from hunger. However, it is a symptomatic treatment, as it does not address the root causes of poverty or food insecurity that lead people to need free meals.
coverage_gap_note: Beneficiaries are limited to those who visit the specific temples where the scheme is implemented.

promise_text_en: During the Central Government's population census, we will urge the Central Government to swiftly conduct a caste-based census based on the Caste-based Census Commission already formed during the regime of Former Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Thiru. Edappadi K. Palaniswami.
promise_text_ta: மத்திய அரசின் மக்கள் தொகைக் கணக்கெடுப்பின் போது, முன்னாள் முதலமைச்சர் திரு. எடப்பாடி கே. பழனிசாமி ஆட்சியில் அமைக்கப்பட்ட சாதிவாரி கணக்கெடுப்பு ஆணையத்தின் அடிப்படையில் சாதிவாரி கணக்கெடுப்பை விரைவாக நடத்த மத்திய அரசை வலியுறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Aims to generate precise data on caste demographics to enable more accurate and equitable targeting of reservation and welfare policies.

promise_components.component: Urge the Central Government to conduct a caste-based census.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy demand directed at the Union Government, which has the sole authority to conduct the national census. The state government can only advocate for this, not implement it. The reference to a previous state commission is for political context.

fiscal_cost_note: ₹0. The cost of the national census is entirely borne by the Union Government.
sustainability_reasoning: A lack of accurate, contemporary data is a root barrier to effective social justice policy. A caste census would provide a structural foundation for evidence-based policymaking for decades to come.

promise_text_en: A special committee will be formed to implement the RR Policy (Rehabilitation and Resettlement Policy) for people who provide land to NLC in Neyveli.
promise_text_ta: நெய்வேலியில் என்.எல்.சி.க்கு நிலம் வழங்கும் மக்களுக்காக ஆர்.ஆர். கொள்கையை (புனர்வாழ்வு மற்றும் மீள்குடியேற்றக் கொள்கை) செயல்படுத்த ஒரு சிறப்புக் குழு அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated administrative body to oversee and enforce the implementation of rehabilitation and resettlement for families displaced by a specific industrial project.

promise_components.component: Form a special committee to implement the RR Policy for people who provide land to NLC in Neyveli.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action to create a committee. The direct cost is negligible, limited to the operational expenses of the committee. The promise is the formation of the committee, not the financial package of the RR policy itself.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible cost. The operational expenses of a committee are minimal and would fit comfortably within existing departmental budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of grievance: the failure or delay in implementing statutory rehabilitation policies. A dedicated committee creates a structural mechanism for enforcement and accountability.
coverage_gap_note: The committee is specific to land providers for NLC in Neyveli and does not cover those affected by other projects.

promise_text_en: For those receiving low pensions under the EPS-95 pension scheme provided to retired workers who have worked for more than 10 years in private companies in Tamil Nadu, studies will be conducted to ensure they receive a substantial minimum monthly pension based on the practices followed in Kerala and Puducherry.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் 10 ஆண்டுகளுக்கு மேல் தனியார் நிறுவனங்களில் பணியாற்றி ஓய்வு பெற்ற தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு வழங்கப்படும் இபிஎஸ்-95 ஓய்வூதியத் திட்டத்தின் கீழ் குறைந்த ஓய்வூதியம் பெறுபவர்களுக்கு, கேரளா மற்றும் புதுச்சேரியில் பின்பற்றப்படும் நடைமுறைகளின் அடிப்படையில் கணிசமான குறைந்தபட்ச மாதாந்திர ஓய்வூதியம் கிடைப்பதை உறுதிசெய்ய ஆய்வுகள் நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Initiates a formal review process to gather data and formulate proposals for enhancing a centrally-administered pension scheme.

promise_components.component: Conduct studies to ensure a substantial minimum monthly pension for low-pension recipients under the EPS-95 scheme.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is limited to conducting a study. The EPS-95 scheme is a central government program under the EPFO. The state government has no authority to alter the pension amount, it can only study and recommend changes to the Centre.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible cost. The cost of commissioning a study is minimal for the state government.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is only to 'study' an issue over which the state has no direct control. While a study can be a first step, as a standalone promise it delivers no material benefit and primarily serves as political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is only to study the issue, not to provide any relief.

promise_text_en: Reservation of 1 percent will be provided for the children of ex-servicemen for admission to Arts and Science undergraduate courses.
promise_text_ta: கலை மற்றும் அறிவியல் இளங்கலைப் படிப்புகளில் முன்னாள் ராணுவ வீரர்களின் பிள்ளைகளுக்கு 1 சதவீத இடஒதுக்கீடு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Improves access to higher education for a specific group by creating a dedicated quota of reserved seats in colleges.

promise_components.component: Provide 1 percent reservation for the children of ex-servicemen for admission to Arts and Science undergraduate courses.
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-financial policy change that reallocates existing admission seats. It does not create new seats or involve any direct expenditure from the state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: ₹0. This is a reservation policy that reallocates existing resources (college seats) and has no direct fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent, structural pathway for a target group to access higher education. It addresses a potential barrier to entry by guaranteeing a certain level of representation.
coverage_gap_note: The reservation is limited to Arts and Science courses, excluding professional degrees like engineering, medicine, or law.

promise_text_en: Compassionate appointments will be provided to the family members of martyred and disabled soldiers in the military.
promise_text_ta: ராணுவத்தில் வீரமரணம் அடைந்த மற்றும் ஊனமுற்ற வீரர்களின் குடும்ப உறுப்பினர்களுக்கு கருணை அடிப்படையில் வேலைவாய்ப்பு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 44
impact_mechanism: Provides long-term financial security to the immediate family of a martyred or disabled soldier by granting them a government job.

promise_components.component: Provide compassionate appointments to the family members of martyred and disabled soldiers.
promise_components.analysis: This policy provides a government job to one member of an affected family. The cost is the recurring annual salary for each appointee. The number of potential beneficiaries per year is not available in the reference data, so a total cost cannot be estimated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The annual cost would be the total salary expenditure for all appointees, but the number of eligible families each year is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a relief measure that addresses the symptom (loss of family income) resulting from a tragedy. While providing profound and lasting security, it is a response to an event, not a structural fix to prevent the cause.
coverage_gap_note: The benefit is contingent on a family member meeting the eligibility and qualification criteria for an available government post.
